description: Create and post a GL Journal Entry in iDempiere for the GardenWorld company representing a media advertising expense. Use the description 'Q1 Marketing Campaign - Digital Advertising' and the current accounting date in USD. Include two balanced lines: a debit of 3500.00 to account '62100 - Media Advertising' and a credit of 3500.00 to account '11100 - Checking Account'. Post the completed entry.
